payload.answer: I couldn't safely store this as durable memory because "Sam" could refer to Sam from Goldman or Sam from Point72. Please clarify which Sam you mean.
citations: New message: Sam mentioned that he likes Bill Evans

entity_resolution.reason: The mention of "Sam" is ambiguous because there are two existing entities: Sam from Goldman and Sam from Point72. The preference cannot be durably attached to either person without clarification.

details: Ambiguous subject reference prevented entity resolution.

repair_options: Specify whether this was Sam from Goldman or Sam from Point72.
